items.title: Vite project and dependency pinning: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this React: Component-Based Browser Applications misconception? If the development server works, dependency and production configuration are necessarily correct.
hints: Compare both options with platform semantics and observable user or browser evidence.

feedback.incorrect: That preserves the misconception. Verify the pinned production build and runtime configuration; development success is not deployment evidence.
